body_txt:
Bones flung as projectiles. Bone projectiles are extremely commonly thrown by Scary Skeletons . In most cases the launchers never run out of bones . This brings up the question whether the creature uses its own bones, the bones of others, or just bone-like things it somehow creates or summons.
Usually Stock Femur Bones . A subtrope of Abnormal Ammo and Bad with the Bone . Compare Spike Shooter , Throwing Your Sword Always Works , and Improvised Weapon . A magical version is common amongst Necromancers , along with barriers or other constructions composed of bone.
